Advisory - Control Burn - Coyote Creek Parkway
Expect smoke in the area. Santa Clara County Parks is hosting live wildfire training at Coyote Creek Parkway on June 17 and 18 with support from the Santa Clara County Fire Department.

The training is scheduled to take place between 8 a.m. - 3 p.m.
